phase_data.during_instructions: Please click on the red ball
phase_data.free_contingency:
try:
    # First reinforcement: after 10 seconds
    # Later reinforcements: 10 seconds after last one
    if (sim.last_reinforcement_time is None and current_seconds > 10) or \
       (sim.last_reinforcement_time is not None and 
        current_seconds > sim.last_reinforcement_time + 10):

        print('Tried to increment score')
        total_score += 1
        sim.last_reinforcement_time = current_seconds

except Exception as e:
    print('Exception occurred:', e)
    pass

phase_data.skip_if:
ball_phase_summaries[current_phase -1]["ball_1"]["score"] < ball_phase_summaries[current_phase -1]["ball_2"]["score"]
# skip if not a rule follower
